name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Localize video text overlays into any language without rebuilding your visuals.
problem: Businesses expanding globally must recreate video assets from scratch when translating on-screen text, burning time and budget. Visual Translate automates the detection and replacement of text within video visuals, preserving the original design. This removes the bottleneck of manual redesign when localizing content for new markets.
useCases: Localizing marketing videos for international campaigns without redesigning motion graphics
Translating on-screen text in product demo videos for regional sales teams
Adapting training or onboarding videos for multilingual workforces
Dubbing and text-translating social media content for global audience reach
